Common.disclaimerBody: This site provides a digital software service for decision support. It does not sell physical goods or provide offline services.
Common.disclaimerNote: Scores are informational only and are not medical, financial, or legal advice.

HomePage.headline: Check your decision risk before you act
HomePage.subhead: Enter a few details to estimate your current decision risk.
HomePage.menuPlaceholder: e.g. pasta, salad, or a set menu
HomePage.aiExplanationBody: Based on price per person {pricePerPerson} and time {time} min, the risk is {label}.
HomePage.aiExplanationEmpty: Run an analysis to generate an explanation.
HomePage.aiExplanationLocked: AI explanations are available on the Pro plan.
HomePage.aiExplanationError: Unable to generate an AI explanation right now.
HomePage.weeklySummaryLocked: Weekly summary is available on the Pro plan.
HomePage.recordsLocked: Records are available on the Pro plan.
HomePage.aiWeeklyHint: Generate insights for patterns, next-week goal, and improvement tip.
HomePage.aiWeeklyEmpty: Run analyses this week to generate insights.
HomePage.aiWeeklyError: Unable to generate weekly insights right now.
HomePage.calendarLocked: Calendar view is available on the Pro plan.
HomePage.messageMissing: Please enter price, time, and people count.
HomePage.messageInvalid: Please enter valid numbers for price, time, and people.
HomePage.noScore: No score yet. Run an analysis.
HomePage.reportTip: Tip: refine the menu or adjust price/time to lower risk.
HomePage.timelineHint: Taller bars indicate higher average risk.
HomePage.timelineEmpty: No data yet. Your timeline will appear here.
HomePage.calendarHint: Select a date to view your records.
HomePage.noRecordsCalendar: No records yet. Once you analyze, entries appear on the calendar.
HomePage.noRecords: No records yet. Run an analysis to start tracking.

Auth.loginSubtitle: Log in with email and password.
Auth.signupSubtitle: Create an account with email and password.
Auth.signupSuccessVerify: Sign-up complete! Please verify your email.

Profile.title: Profile
Profile.subtitle: Manage your email and basic profile details.
Profile.notSignedIn: You need to log in to view your profile.

Checkout.cancelBody: The payment failed or was canceled during processing.
Checkout.cancelNote: No charges were made. Please try again with a different method.
